brief_justification: Arrives at exact correct answer (A) with valid reasoning about O1 partitioning and O2 lacking Content X; goes one level beyond surface by systematically walking through each server group's failure mode; implicitly recognizes the distractor (D) but does not reflect on its own reasoning method or name potential biases; explicitly checks distractor option D and explains why it fails, constituting basic verification without boundary-condition or counterfactual testing; presents conclusions confidently with no stated assumptions or confidence levels about the caching/partition semantics; explicitly identifies option D as a distractor and explains its limitation, though does not fully enumerate why B and C also fail; every conclusion traces to an explicit derivation—server group, fallback target, content location, partition state—reproducible by a third party
